title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Tontatta, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #4 as the Tontatta prepare their plan against Doflamingo while Franky, the Toy Soldier, and the rebels reveal Dressrosa’s hidden suffering.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: That we have sworn to bring our war with doFlamingo to an end!! And once more a legendary hero has appeared!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: usoland!! As soon as you're done eating, we'll take the underground passage and head for the flower fields!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: On the FATED final battlefield of Dressrosa, the commander of the Riku Royal Fighters

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: And his men are waiting for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please, take the lead and guide us into battle!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: We're going to crush that Donquixote Doflamingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: With usoland backing us up, we'll be unbeatable !!!

summary: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
